title: Oreo Bliss Air-Fry
description: A light and crispy Croatian dessert featuring creamy Oreo biscuits air-fried to perfection, ideal for those looking for a low-calorie-friendly treat.
instructions: In a bowl, mix the vanilla extract with the coconut oil until well combined.
Gradually add brown sugar while continuously stirring to prevent lumps from forming.
Separate Oreo cookies into two piles: one for crumbs and one for chunks. Using your fingers, gently crumble about 12 cookies and break another 12 into bite-sized pieces.
Fold the crumbled and chunked Oreos into the melted oil mixture until evenly coated.
Evenly spread the coated Oreo mixture in a single layer inside the air fryer basket without overcrowding.
Air-fry for about 8-10 minutes or until golden brown, flipping once halfway through cooking.
Let it cool down slightly before serving to keep it crunchy.
